coculture_LD.name: Alteromonas macleodii MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD (L:D periodic)
coculture_LD.functional_description: Enriched for transcripts exhibiting 24-h periodicity in coculture under diel light:dark conditions, including genes associated with photosynthesis, Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosystem components.
coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture during the normal diel light:dark cycle but lose periodicity under extended darkness when grown alone. Periodicity is maintained longer in coculture than in axenic culture.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence based on transcriptome periodicity analysis and pathway enrichment tests.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts exhibited 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture than in pure culture, both over the normal diel cycle and after the shift to extended darkness.

The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.
Within these general trends in periodic behavior, we found that subsets of the Prochlorococcus transcriptome exhibited periodic oscillations under different combinations of culture conditions.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: Alteromonas macleodii MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic across all conditions)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.functional_description: Includes transcripts that maintain 24-h periodicity in coculture both under diel light:dark cycles and extended darkness, associated with metabolic pathways such as Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.temporal_pattern: Genes exhibit 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture under both diel light:dark and extended darkness conditions, indicating sustained metabolic activity in the dark when in coculture.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: High confidence from transcriptomic periodicity data and pathway enrichment analysis.

supporting_quotes.quote: Looking more closely at the set of transcripts that continued oscillating under extended darkness in cocultured but not in axenic cells, we find transcripts associated with a variety of metabolic pathways, including the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.
This further indicates that the presence of the heterotroph may help Prochlorococcus survive the stress of extended darkness by contributing to the maintenance of regular metabolic functionality.

coculture_darkness.name: Alteromonas macleodii MIT1002 cluster coculture_darkness (not periodic)

supporting_quotes.quote: Only 6% of transcripts exhibited 24-h periodicity through the first 13 h of extended darkness in axenic cultures, while 25% did so in cocultures; periodicity essentially vanished in Alteromonas under extended darkness.
